# Prisma Capital

> Prisma Capital runs three fully algorithmic, rules-based trading strategies,
> traded live since early 2026. Backtests and live performance are published and
> updated daily (indexed to 100 at live inception). The exact strategy parameters
> are private. This is not investment advice.

## Strategies

### Nasdaq x Gold Rotation (higher risk)
URL: https://www.prisma-capital.xyz/rotation.html
- Rotates between leveraged Nasdaq-100 and Gold: trend-following, volatility-based
  exposure scaling, and a protective trailing stop.
- High risk / high reward. Backtested over ~40 years of index data, with a high
  model maximum drawdown; leveraged instruments can lose value rapidly.
- Can be copied on eToro: https://www.etoro.com/people/pauladrienb

### Quality (lower risk)
URL: https://www.prisma-capital.xyz/quality.html
- Buys financially strong, low-debt companies with healthy growth at a reasonable
  price, in a focused, equal-weighted basket of US stocks, rebalanced twice a year.
- Lower risk. Backtested since 2010. Quality investing favours consistently
  profitable, financially solid businesses bought at sensible valuations.

### Balance Equilibrium (lowest risk)
URL: https://www.prisma-capital.xyz/steady.html
- Our steadiest strategy: a diversified, no-leverage blend of equities, gold and
  bonds, built for slow, smooth, low-volatility growth.
- Lowest risk (rated 3/10), designed to beat US markets over the long run with
  much smaller drawdowns than a plain stock portfolio. Benchmarked against the
  S&P 500. Backtested on multi-decade data; live performance updated daily.

## Contact
URL: https://www.prisma-capital.xyz/contact.html
- For setting up or copying the strategies, or any question.

Author: Paul Adrien. Not investment advice. Past and simulated performance do not
guarantee future results. These strategies involve risk, including loss of capital.
